steps.title: Name a specific program
steps.content: The student wants a specific example of a slow TV program. The best sentence should name an actual program and include relevant identifying details, not just define the genre or quote a scholar.

steps.title: Reject general information
steps.content: A names a scholar's book rather than a slow TV program. C defines slow TV in general terms. D uses Whitfield's description of the genre but does not identify a specific program. The remaining choice names Nordlandsbanen: Minutt for Minutt and describes its 10-hour train broadcast. The answer is B.
